action_mappings.release_trade_leg_reservation: release reservation of trade leg {} from reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.reserve_external_confirmation_for_case: reserve external confirmation {} for reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.release_external_confirmation_reservatio: release reservation of external confirmation {} from reconciliation case {}

action_mappings.release_settlement_event_reservation: release reservation of settlement event {} from reconciliation case {}

action_mappings.release_counterparty_reservation: release counterparty reference {} reservation for reconciliation case {}

action_mappings.mark_ready_for_resolution: mark reconciliation case {} as ready for resolution linked to trade leg {}, external confirmation {}, and escalation bucket {}
action_mappings.mark_ready_and_escalate: mark reconciliation case {} as ready for resolution and escalate linked to settlement event {}, counterparty reference {}, and exception category {}

action_mappings.reapply_evidence_collection: reapply evidence collection for reconciliation case {} using evidence attachment {} by operator identity {}

action_mappings.attest_attachment_from_feed: attest attachment for reconciliation case {} using third party feed item {}

action_mappings.operator_attest_evidence: attest evidence attachment {} for reconciliation case {} by operator identity {}

action_mappings.close_case_with_approval: close reconciliation case {} with approval token {}
action_mappings.close_case_with_operator_attestation: close reconciliation case {} with operator attestation

action_mappings_indef.release_ledger_entry_reservation: release reservation of a ledger entry {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.attach_evidence: attach an evidence attachment {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.detach_evidence: detach an evidence attachment {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.verify_evidence_via_attachment: verify evidence for a reconciliation case {} using an evidence attachment {}
action_mappings_indef.verify_evidence_via_feed_item: verify evidence for a reconciliation case {} using a third party feed item {}

action_mappings_indef.validate_case_with_approval_token: validate a reconciliation case {} using an approval token {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_trade_leg_for_case: reserve a trade leg {} for a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_trade_leg_reservation: release reservation of a trade leg {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_external_confirmation_for_case: reserve an external confirmation {} for a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_external_confirmation_reservatio: release reservation of an external confirmation {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_settlement_event_for_case: reserve a settlement event {} for a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_settlement_event_reservation: release reservation of a settlement event {} from a reconciliation case {}

action_mappings_indef.release_counterparty_reservation: release a counterparty reference {} reservation for a reconciliation case {}

action_mappings_indef.validate_with_settlement_and_compliance: validate a reconciliation case {} with a posting batch {}, a settlement event {}, and a compliance document {}

predicate_mappings.case_to_trade_leg: {} is linked to the trade leg {}
predicate_mappings.case_to_confirmation: {} is linked to the external confirmation {}
predicate_mappings.case_to_settlement: {} is linked to the settlement event {}
predicate_mappings.case_to_counterparty: {} is linked to the counterparty reference {}

predicate_mappings.ready_for_final_evidence_collection: {} is ready for final evidence collection

predicate_mappings.trade_leg_available: {} is available in the trade leg
predicate_mappings.settlement_event_available: {} is available for the settlement event
predicate_mappings.third_party_feed_item_available: {} is available in the third-party feed
predicate_mappings.case_possible_ledger_candidate: {} is a possible ledger candidate for {}
predicate_mappings.case_possible_posting_batch: {} is a possible posting batch for {}
predicate_mappings.case_possible_trade_leg: {} is a possible trade leg for {}

preconditions: I can only activate a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that A is active and it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I activate a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is active

reserve_ledger_entry_for_case.description: reserve a ledger entry B for a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a ledger entry B for a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is active and B is available in the ledger and A is a possible ledger candidate for B
I can only reserve a ledger entry B for a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that A has a case assignment flag
effects: Once I reserve a ledger entry B for a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is assigned to A and A has a case assignment flag
Once I reserve a ledger entry B for a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available in the ledger

release_ledger_entry_reservation.description: release reservation of a ledger entry B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only release reservation of a ledger entry B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that B is assigned to A
I can only release reservation of a ledger entry B from a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that A has a verification flag and it is not the case that A is ready for resolution
effects: Once I release reservation of a ledger entry B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available in the ledger

Once I release reservation of a ledger entry B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to A and it is not the case anymore that A has a case assignment flag and it is not the case anymore that A has verified case evidence and it is not the case anymore that A has been validated and it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation flag and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for final evidence collection and it is not the case anymore that A is under additional review flag

attach_evidence.description: attach an evidence attachment B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only attach an evidence attachment B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is active and B is available as an attachment
effects: Once I attach an evidence attachment B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is linked to the evidence attachment B
Once I attach an evidence attachment B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as an attachment

detach_evidence.description: detach an evidence attachment B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only detach an evidence attachment B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is linked to the evidence attachment B
effects: Once I detach an evidence attachment B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available as an attachment
Once I detach an evidence attachment B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the evidence attachment B

verify_evidence_via_attachment.description: verify evidence for a reconciliation case A using an evidence attachment B
preconditions: I can only verify evidence for a reconciliation case A using an evidence attachment B if it is the case that A is active and A has a case assignment flag and A is linked to the evidence attachment B
I can only verify evidence for a reconciliation case A using an evidence attachment B if it is not the case that A has verified case evidence
effects: Once I verify evidence for a reconciliation case A using an evidence attachment B, it is the case that A has verified case evidence

verify_evidence_via_feed_item.description: verify evidence for a reconciliation case A using a third party feed item B
preconditions: I can only verify evidence for a reconciliation case A using a third party feed item B if it is the case that A is active and A has a case assignment flag and B is available in the third party feed
I can only verify evidence for a reconciliation case A using a third party feed item B if it is not the case that A has verified case evidence
effects: Once I verify evidence for a reconciliation case A using a third party feed item B, it is the case that A has verified case evidence and A has an escalation flag
Once I verify evidence for a reconciliation case A using a third party feed item B, it is not the case anymore that B is available in the third party feed

operator_attach_evidence.description: attach evidence an evidence attachment B to a reconciliation case A by an operator identity C
preconditions: I can only attach evidence an evidence attachment B to a reconciliation case A by an operator identity C if it is the case that A has verified case evidence and A has a case assignment flag and A is linked to the evidence attachment B and C is available
I can only attach evidence an evidence attachment B to a reconciliation case A by an operator identity C if it is not the case that A has been validated
effects: Once I attach evidence an evidence attachment B to a reconciliation case A by an operator identity C, it is the case that A has been validated
Once I attach evidence an evidence attachment B to a reconciliation case A by an operator identity C, it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation flag

validate_case_with_approval_token.description: validate a reconciliation case A using an approval token B
preconditions: I can only validate a reconciliation case A using an approval token B if it is the case that A has a case assignment flag and A has consumed approval token B
I can only validate a reconciliation case A using an approval token B if it is not the case that A has been validated
effects: Once I validate a reconciliation case A using an approval token B, it is the case that A has been validated
Once I validate a reconciliation case A using an approval token B, it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation flag

reserve_trade_leg_for_case.description: reserve a trade leg B for a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a trade leg B for a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is active and B is available in the trade leg and A is a possible trade leg for B
effects: Once I reserve a trade leg B for a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is linked to the trade leg B
Once I reserve a trade leg B for a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available in the trade leg

release_trade_leg_reservation.description: release reservation of a trade leg B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only release reservation of a trade leg B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is linked to the trade leg B
effects: Once I release reservation of a trade leg B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available in the trade leg
Once I release reservation of a trade leg B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the trade leg B

reserve_external_confirmation_for_case.description: reserve an external confirmation B for a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only reserve an external confirmation B for a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is active and B is available for external confirmation and A is a possible confirmation for B
effects: Once I reserve an external confirmation B for a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is linked to the external confirmation B
Once I reserve an external confirmation B for a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available for external confirmation

release_external_confirmation_reservatio.description: release reservation of an external confirmation B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only release reservation of an external confirmation B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is linked to the external confirmation B
effects: Once I release reservation of an external confirmation B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available for external confirmation
Once I release reservation of an external confirmation B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the external confirmation B

reserve_settlement_event_for_case.description: reserve a settlement event B for a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a settlement event B for a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is active and B is available for the settlement event and A is a possible settlement for B
effects: Once I reserve a settlement event B for a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is linked to the settlement event B
Once I reserve a settlement event B for a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available for the settlement event

release_settlement_event_reservation.description: release reservation of a settlement event B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only release reservation of a settlement event B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is linked to the settlement event B
effects: Once I release reservation of a settlement event B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available for the settlement event
Once I release reservation of a settlement event B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the settlement event B

reserve_counterparty_for_case.description: reserve a counterparty reference B for a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a counterparty reference B for a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is active and B is available and A is a possible counterparty for B
effects: Once I reserve a counterparty reference B for a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is linked to the counterparty reference B
Once I reserve a counterparty reference B for a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_counterparty_reservation.description: release a counterparty reference B reservation for a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only release a counterparty reference B reservation for a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is linked to the counterparty reference B
effects: Once I release a counterparty reference B reservation for a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a counterparty reference B reservation for a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the counterparty reference B

validate_with_posting_batch_and_legs.description: validate a reconciliation case A with a posting batch B, a trade leg C, and an external confirmation D
preconditions: I can only validate a reconciliation case A with a posting batch B, a trade leg C, and an external confirmation D if it is the case that A has a case assignment flag and A is linked to the trade leg C and A is linked to the external confirmation D and B is available in the posting batch and A is a possible posting batch for B
I can only validate a reconciliation case A with a posting batch B, a trade leg C, and an external confirmation D if it is not the case that A has a verification flag
effects: Once I validate a reconciliation case A with a posting batch B, a trade leg C, and an external confirmation D, it is the case that A is linked to the posting batch B and A has a verification flag
Once I validate a reconciliation case A with a posting batch B, a trade leg C, and an external confirmation D, it is not the case anymore that B is available in the posting batch

validate_with_settlement_and_compliance.description: validate a reconciliation case A with a posting batch B, a settlement event C, and a compliance document D
preconditions: I can only validate a reconciliation case A with a posting batch B, a settlement event C, and a compliance document D if it is the case that A has a case assignment flag and A is linked to the settlement event C and D is available and B is available in the posting batch and A is a possible posting batch for B and A is a possible compliance document for D
I can only validate a reconciliation case A with a posting batch B, a settlement event C, and a compliance document D if it is not the case that A has a verification flag
effects: Once I validate a reconciliation case A with a posting batch B, a settlement event C, and a compliance document D, it is the case that A is linked to the posting batch B and A has a verification flag and A is under additional review flag and A has an escalation flag

Once I validate a reconciliation case A with a posting batch B, a settlement event C, and a compliance document D, it is not the case anymore that B is available in the posting batch and it is not the case anymore that D is available

clear_additional_review_flag.description: clear additional review flag for a reconciliation case A linked to a trade leg B and an external confirmation C
preconditions: I can only clear additional review flag for a reconciliation case A linked to a trade leg B and an external confirmation C if it is the case that A has a verification flag and A is under additional review flag and A is linked to the trade leg B and A is linked to the external confirmation C
effects: Once I clear additional review flag for a reconciliation case A linked to a trade leg B and an external confirmation C, it is not the case anymore that A is under additional review flag and it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation flag

mark_ready_for_resolution.description: mark a reconciliation case A as ready for resolution linked to a trade leg B, an external confirmation C, and an escalation bucket D
preconditions: I can only mark a reconciliation case A as ready for resolution linked to a trade leg B, an external confirmation C, and an escalation bucket D if it is the case that A has been validated and A has a verification flag and A is linked to the trade leg B and A is linked to the external confirmation C and A is linked to the index reference D

I can only mark a reconciliation case A as ready for resolution linked to a trade leg B, an external confirmation C, and an escalation bucket D if it is not the case that A has an escalation flag and it is not the case that A is ready for resolution
effects: Once I mark a reconciliation case A as ready for resolution linked to a trade leg B, an external confirmation C, and an escalation bucket D, it is the case that A is ready for resolution

mark_ready_and_escalate.description: mark a reconciliation case A as ready for resolution and escalate linked to a settlement event B, a counterparty reference C, and an exception category D
preconditions: I can only mark a reconciliation case A as ready for resolution and escalate linked to a settlement event B, a counterparty reference C, and an exception category D if it is the case that A has been validated and A has a verification flag and A is linked to the settlement event B and A is linked to the counterparty reference C and A is linked to the index reference D

I can only mark a reconciliation case A as ready for resolution and escalate linked to a settlement event B, a counterparty reference C, and an exception category D if it is not the case that A is ready for resolution
effects: Once I mark a reconciliation case A as ready for resolution and escalate linked to a settlement event B, a counterparty reference C, and an exception category D, it is the case that A is ready for resolution and A has an escalation flag

finalize_resolution_and_prepare_hold.description: finalize resolution for a reconciliation case A and prepare hold linked to a trade leg B and an external confirmation C
preconditions: I can only finalize resolution for a reconciliation case A and prepare hold linked to a trade leg B and an external confirmation C if it is the case that A is ready for resolution and A has an escalation flag and A is linked to the trade leg B and A is linked to the external confirmation C
effects: Once I finalize resolution for a reconciliation case A and prepare hold linked to a trade leg B and an external confirmation C, it is the case that A is ready for final evidence collection

Once I finalize resolution for a reconciliation case A and prepare hold linked to a trade leg B and an external confirmation C, it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation flag and it is not the case anymore that A has been validated and it is not the case anymore that A is under additional review flag

reapply_evidence_collection.description: reapply evidence collection for a reconciliation case A using an evidence attachment B by an operator identity C
preconditions: I can only reapply evidence collection for a reconciliation case A using an evidence attachment B by an operator identity C if it is the case that A is ready for final evidence collection and A is ready for resolution and A has a case assignment flag and A is linked to the evidence attachment B and C is available
I can only reapply evidence collection for a reconciliation case A using an evidence attachment B by an operator identity C if it is not the case that A has been validated
effects: Once I reapply evidence collection for a reconciliation case A using an evidence attachment B by an operator identity C, it is the case that A has been validated

attest_attachment.description: attest attachment for a reconciliation case A with an evidence attachment B
preconditions: I can only attest attachment for a reconciliation case A with an evidence attachment B if it is the case that A is ready for resolution and A has been validated and A is linked to the evidence attachment B
I can only attest attachment for a reconciliation case A with an evidence attachment B if it is not the case that A has an escalation flag and it is not the case that the attachment for A is attested
effects: Once I attest attachment for a reconciliation case A with an evidence attachment B, it is the case that the attachment for A is attested

attest_attachment_from_feed.description: attest attachment for a reconciliation case A using a third party feed item B
preconditions: I can only attest attachment for a reconciliation case A using a third party feed item B if it is the case that A is ready for resolution and A has been validated and B is available in the third party feed

I can only attest attachment for a reconciliation case A using a third party feed item B if it is not the case that A has an escalation flag and it is not the case that the attachment for A is attested
effects: Once I attest attachment for a reconciliation case A using a third party feed item B, it is the case that the attachment for A is attested
Once I attest attachment for a reconciliation case A using a third party feed item B, it is not the case anymore that B is available in the third party feed

route_for_approval.description: route a reconciliation case A for approval using an approval token B
preconditions: I can only route a reconciliation case A for approval using an approval token B if it is the case that the attachment for A is attested and B is available and A is routed for approval with B
effects: Once I route a reconciliation case A for approval using an approval token B, it is the case that A is linked to the approval token B
Once I route a reconciliation case A for approval using an approval token B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

consume_approval_for_parent_and_related.description: consume an approval token C for a parent case A and a related case B
preconditions: I can only consume an approval token C for a parent case A and a related case B if it is the case that A is active and A is eligible for secondary closure and A is linked to approval token C and B is linked to the approval token C
I can only consume an approval token C for a parent case A and a related case B if it is not the case that A has consumed approval token C
effects: Once I consume an approval token C for a parent case A and a related case B, it is the case that A has consumed approval token C

operator_attest_evidence.description: attest an evidence attachment B for a reconciliation case A by an operator identity C
preconditions: I can only attest an evidence attachment B for a reconciliation case A by an operator identity C if it is the case that A is active and A is eligible for secondary closure and A has been validated and the attachment for A is attested and A is linked to the evidence attachment B and C is available
I can only attest an evidence attachment B for a reconciliation case A by an operator identity C if it is not the case that A has an operator attestation flag
effects: Once I attest an evidence attachment B for a reconciliation case A by an operator identity C, it is the case that A has an operator attestation flag

close_case_via_primary_route.description: close a reconciliation case A via primary route
preconditions: I can only close a reconciliation case A via primary route if it is the case that A is eligible for primary closure and A is active and A has a case assignment flag and A has a verification flag and A is ready for resolution and the attachment for A is attested and A has been validated
I can only close a reconciliation case A via primary route if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a reconciliation case A via primary route, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_with_approval.description: close a reconciliation case A with an approval token B
preconditions: I can only close a reconciliation case A with an approval token B if it is the case that A is eligible for secondary closure and A is active and A has a case assignment flag and A has a verification flag and A is ready for resolution and the attachment for A is attested and A has been validated and A has consumed approval token B
I can only close a reconciliation case A with an approval token B if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a reconciliation case A with an approval token B, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_with_operator_attestation.description: close a reconciliation case A with operator attestation
preconditions: I can only close a reconciliation case A with operator attestation if it is the case that A is eligible for secondary closure and A is active and A has a case assignment flag and A has a verification flag and A is ready for resolution and the attachment for A is attested and A has been validated and A has an operator attestation flag
I can only close a reconciliation case A with operator attestation if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a reconciliation case A with operator attestation, it is the case that A is closed

action_nl_templates.reserve_ledger_entry_for_case: reserve ledger entry {?ledger_entry} for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.release_ledger_entry_reservation: release reservation of ledger entry {?ledger_entry} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.attach_evidence: attach evidence attachment {?evidence_attachment} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.detach_evidence: detach evidence attachment {?evidence_attachment} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.verify_evidence_via_attachment: verify evidence for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using evidence attachment {?evidence_attachment}
action_nl_templates.verify_evidence_via_feed_item: verify evidence for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using third party feed item {?third_party_feed_item}
action_nl_templates.operator_attach_evidence: attach evidence evidence attachment {?evidence_attachment} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} by operator identity {?operator_identity}
action_nl_templates.validate_case_with_approval_token: validate reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using approval token {?approval_token}
action_nl_templates.reserve_trade_leg_for_case: reserve trade leg {?trade_leg} for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.release_trade_leg_reservation: release reservation of trade leg {?trade_leg} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_external_confirmation_for_case: reserve external confirmation {?external_confirmation} for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.release_external_confirmation_reservatio: release reservation of external confirmation {?external_confirmation} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_settlement_event_for_case: reserve settlement event {?settlement_event} for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.release_settlement_event_reservation: release reservation of settlement event {?settlement_event} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_counterparty_for_case: reserve counterparty reference {?counterparty_reference} for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.release_counterparty_reservation: release counterparty reference {?counterparty_reference} reservation for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.validate_with_posting_batch_and_legs: validate reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with posting batch {?posting_batch}, trade leg {?trade_leg}, and external confirmation {?external_confirmation}
action_nl_templates.validate_with_settlement_and_compliance: validate reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with posting batch {?posting_batch}, settlement event {?settlement_event}, and compliance document {?compliance_document}
action_nl_templates.clear_additional_review_flag: clear additional review flag for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} linked to trade leg {?trade_leg} and external confirmation {?external_confirmation}
action_nl_templates.mark_ready_for_resolution: mark reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} as ready for resolution linked to trade leg {?trade_leg}, external confirmation {?external_confirmation}, and escalation bucket {?escalation_bucket}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a reconciliation case or a ledger entry or a posting batch or a external confirmation or a trade leg or a settlement event or a evidence attachment or a third party feed item or a approval token or a operator identity or a compliance document or a counterparty reference or a index reference is also a object
Everything that is a escalation bucket or a exception category is also a index reference
Everything that is a related case or a parent case is also a reconciliation case
